reviews.text:
We couldn't have asked for a more thoughtful and organized wedding planner to bring our mountain wedding vision to life! Kathleen of Telluride Presents made the entire experience feel genuinely enjoyable.

From day one, Kathleen was organized, responsive, and began moving everything forward. She took the time to understand exactly what we wanted and then elevated it in ways we never would have thought of ourselves. Every recommendation—from vendors to design elements—was spot on and perfectly suited to the setting. Kathleen has great relationships with local vendors in Telluride, which helped streamline the planning process.

As you can imagine, logistics for a mountain wedding could be a challenge, but everything came together seamlessly. Transportation, timing and weather conditions were all taken into consideration. Rachel stepped in as our Day-Of Coordinator and ensured our wedding went as planned, even though we had some unforeseen hail weather conditions! She handled all of the behind-the-scenes details flawlessly, and kept everything on schedule. She was able to manage any last minute adjustments without us ever noticing.

One of the things I appreciate most about Kathleen is her ability to anticipate needs before they even arose. She put configured the most detailed timeline, which kept everyone on track leading up to the big day. Because of Kathleen and Rachel, my husband and I were able to be fully present with our family and friends and enjoy the entire experience without a single worry! I would highly recommend Telluride Present to anyone considering hiring a wedding planner. My husband and I will be forever grateful to Kathleen and Rachel for making our day so special.

I couldn’t be happier with my experience working with Kathleen as our wedding planner in Telluride. She was an incredible support, jumping in wherever we needed her and offering valuable guidance throughout the planning process. Kathleen truly saved the day for our rehearsal dinner by confirming our reservations in advance and preventing a major mishap. She’s not only fun, down-to-earth, and full of good energy, but also deeply knowledgeable and well-connected after years of working in Telluride. On the wedding day, everything ran seamlessly, and she coordinated effortlessly with all our vendors. I would absolutely recommend Kathleen again and again—she’s a joy to work with and made our special day even more memorable.

As the mother of the bride, I cannot say enough wonderful things about Kathleen. From our very first conversation, she felt more like a friend than a wedding planner—warm, approachable, and genuinely invested in making this experience special for our family.

She guided us every step of the way with such ease and confidence. She was incredibly proactive, often reaching out with thoughtful ideas and helpful suggestions before we even knew to ask. Her communication was exceptional—clear, consistent, and always reassuring.

From the welcome party through the wedding day, everything was executed seamlessly. Kathleen directed every detail beautifully, allowing all of us—especially my daughter—to be fully present and enjoy every moment.

I am so grateful for Kathleen and would recommend her wholeheartedly.

Kathleen was an absolute dream to work with for our small microwedding in Telluride! She knows the town inside and out, which made planning from afar so much easier. Her local connections and recommendations were spot-on, and she thought about all the little details I never even considered. She was quick to respond to every question and always one step ahead, making sure everything ran smoothly and stress-free. Our day was more perfect than I could have imagined, and I know it’s because of Kathleen’s experience, organization, and genuine care. On the big day, her assistant Rachel was incredible as our day-of coordinator—calm, organized, and ready for anything. If you’re getting married in Telluride, I cannot recommend Telluride Presents enough!

Kathleen was truly a pivotal part of our wedding, and there's no way we could have pulled off this very logistically complicated wedding without her (aka a winter wedding at Gorrono Ranch, which included snowcats to move ourselves & guests up and back down, having our dogs in the ceremony, having an Oxygen bar, limited window to set everything up, all the works).  Having lived in Telluride for over a decade, she knows the vendor scene extremely well, aka who is the best to be working with for flowers, music, desserts, welcome drinks, etc.  Kathleen also has the perfect personality and professionalism for this type of role -- she is so loving and courteous, but also knows when it is time to be stern and in charge (aka when you need vendors to respond, or for guests to actually get moving so we can begin our ceremony & celebrations).  I cannot imagine our wedding without Kathleen, and am already looking forward to seeing her next time we're in town! Truly, our heartfelt thanks to Kathleen for helping us pull this off and have the best day!
